Title: German (de) - UI Translation
Steps:
1. Change language to German
2. Navigate through main pages
3. Verify all UI elements translated
4. Check buttons, labels, messages
Expected Result:
- All UI text in German
- No English fallbacks visible
- Grammar correct

Title: Currency Switcher Visible
Preconditions: Store configured with multiple currencies enabled
Steps:
1. Navigate to the storefront homepage
2. Check the header area for currency switcher
3. Check the footer area if not in header
4. Open the currency switcher
5. Verify available currency options listed
Expected Result:
- Currency switcher control visible in header or footer
- Clicking/tapping opens list of available currencies
- Current active currency shown as selected
- All store-configured currencies listed (minimum: USD, EUR)
- Switcher is keyboard accessible

Title: Switch to EUR
Preconditions: Store configured with USD and EUR, currently displaying USD
Steps:
1. Navigate to a product category page with USD prices
2. Note a product price in USD (e.g., $100.00)
3. Open the currency switcher
4. Select EUR
5. Observe all prices on the page
6. Navigate to the cart (if items present)
7. Verify cart totals
Expected Result:
- All product prices convert to EUR after selection
- Currency symbol changes from $ to euro symbol
- Cart totals shown in EUR
- Mini-cart header also reflects EUR
- Exchange rate applied consistently across all prices on page

Title: Currency Persists Across Navigation
Preconditions: Store with multiple currencies, EUR selected
Steps:
1. Switch currency to EUR
2. Navigate to a different category page
3. Verify prices on new page are in EUR
4. Navigate to a product detail page
5. Verify PDP price is in EUR
6. Refresh the page
7. Verify EUR still selected after refresh
Expected Result:
- EUR prices shown on category page after navigation
- EUR prices shown on product detail page
- Currency preference persists across page navigation
- Currency preference persists after browser page refresh
- No reversion to USD on navigation or refresh

Title: Checkout in Selected Currency
Preconditions: Store with multiple currencies, EUR selected, product in cart
Steps:
1. Switch currency to EUR
2. Add a product to cart
3. Proceed through checkout
4. Verify shipping and payment pages show EUR amounts
5. Verify order review page shows EUR total
6. Place the order
7. Verify order confirmation shows EUR total
8. Verify Order History shows EUR amount
Expected Result:
- All checkout step amounts shown in EUR
- Payment amount charged in EUR
- Order confirmation page shows EUR total
- Order History record shows EUR currency and amount
- No currency mismatch between checkout and confirmation

Title: Currency Symbol Display
Preconditions: Store configured with USD, EUR, and GBP currencies
Steps:
1. Set currency to USD, navigate to any product, note symbol and format
2. Set currency to EUR, navigate to same product, note symbol and format
3. Set currency to GBP, navigate to same product, note symbol and format
4. Compare symbol placement and number formatting for each
Expected Result:
- USD: $ symbol, format $1,234.56
- EUR: euro symbol, format follows locale convention
- GBP: pound symbol, format follows locale convention
- Symbol placement correct for each currency (prefix or suffix as per locale)
- No raw currency code (USD/EUR/GBP) displayed instead of symbol
- Decimal and thousands separators correct per currency locale
